name: Ankit Kumar Singh
my_twin: I would build a digital twin to understand my daily working patterns while learning and building AI projects. I spend a lot of time solving problems and debugging, but sometimes I go too deep into a single issue or delay difficult tasks. I want to track when I lose focus, what kind of problems slow me down, and how my energy changes during the day. This would help me work more efficiently, improve consistency, and solve problems faster instead of just spending more time.
